chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D- 1105 of 2025 [ Maymar Housing Services Pvt. Ltd. V. Province of Sindh and another ] Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Muhammad Osman Ali Hadi Date of hearing: 22.04.2025 Date of decision: 22.04.2025 Petitioner: Through Mr. M. Ahmed Masood, Advocate. Respondents – (Officials): Through Mr. Pervaiz Mastoi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. O R D E R Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J: In this Petition, Petitioner has impugned a Letter dated 06.03.2025 issued by Mukhtiarkar, Gulzar-e-Hijri, Scheme-33, Karachi directing them to appear in a case in respect of Blocked Entry No.39 dated 23.01.1986 of V.F-II, Deh Bitti Amri situated at Scheme-33, Karachi. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he has apprehension that under the garb of this letter, he may be dispossessed. However, learned A.A.G., Sindh submits that this is a simple letter and Petitioner should appear before the Authority and submit its stance. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he has already submitted his stance and he would be satisfied if directions are issued that no coercive action may be taken save in accordance with law. Learned A.A.G., Sindh raises no objection. 2. Accordingly, this Petition is disposed of in the terms whereby against the Petitioner, no coercive action shall be taken save in accordance with law in terms of the impugned letter. The Petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE M. Khan
